title: ardisia kerrii
intro: Ardisia kerrii, also known as the Kerri's ardisia or Thai ardisia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian and Indian Ayurvedic medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ardisia kerrii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, including those caused by bacteria and viruses. Ardisia kerrii is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in treating various diseases, including cancer and neurodegenerative disorders.
